name: Jordyn Rush
subject: Swinging the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

**We MUST win Pennsylvania if we want to take back the Senate for Democrats.** We must.

People are looking at this race and whether we can defeat Pat Toomey and his campaign war chest. Meeting our fundraising goal will be a test of our strength, of our ability, our capacity, and our grit. It's a test of our ability to win.

[**Contribute to our campaign before tomorrow 's critical deadline, so that we can win this election and turn the Senate blue.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5870385042752012288/-8022860370462900224?refcode=e20151129&refcode2=e20151129nd&amount=25)

Katie is our best chance at defeating Pat Toomey and swinging the Senate. With Democratic control of the Senate, we can fight to protect healthcare and bring economic opportunity for hardworking families across Pennsylvania and the United States.

**Almost 5,000 people have donated already, but there 's less than 48 hours to go. [We need you right now to step up and chip in your $5 to Katie's campaign and be one of our founding members.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5870385042752012288/-8022860370462900224?refcode=e20151129&refcode2=e20151129nd&amount=25)**

I really don't know if we're going to get to 5,000 donors by midnight tomorrow. We're close, and it's doable, but I can't say for certain. All I can do is send this email and tell you how important -- how critical -- it is that we give it everything we've got.

[**Donate now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5870385042752012288/-8022860370462900224?refcode=e20151129&refcode2=e20151129nd&amount=25)

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5870385042752012288/-8022860370462900224?refcode=e20151129&refcode2=e20151129nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5870385042752012288/-8094917964500828160).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

So tomorrow only, you can shop the Cruz for President online

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Fwd: please open this email, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140854:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)
---
| | | | Hi Peter, I know this is a busy weekend and you receive a lot of emails, so I just wanted to check in and see if you had a chance to read the email I sent earlier this past week. If not, please read it below right now. Peter, all eyes, on both sides of the aisle, are on my campaign and I need your support to ensure we have the funds needed to fight back. I hope you will read the email below and afterwards **[stand with our campaign with a financial contribution of $15, $25, $50 or more right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140855:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)** **[Thanks for your continued support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)** \- Marco
P.S. Our campaign is still short of our November fundraising goals. Will you please chip in right now and help us reach them? \---------- Forwarded message ----------From: **Marco Rubio** Date: Wed, Nov 25, 2015 at 9:07 AMSubject: please open this email, Peter **[I need your immediate support and help to fight back.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)**

According to an article in the LA Times, the Democrats are afraid of my campaign so they are hoping Republicans will do their dirty work for them.

Peter, the Democrats are scared because they're watching my polling numbers and seeing the impact our campaign is having across the country. They know my campaign's message and ideas for our nation are resonating with millions of Americans. **They know I will be the candidate who defeats Hillary Clinton next November. **

But Peter, in order to run a winning campaign and go up against the huge war chests of my opponents on both sides, we need to close out this November with strong numbers.

**We've set a goal of raising $150,000 by midnight on Monday, November 30th. Will you help us reach that right now?**
---
| | [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**Emergency November DONATION**
**Donation: Pending** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)
---
| Peter, I'm being attacked by both sides. Right now the Establishment Republicans are attacking me in the media for being "too conservative." And the Democrats are gleefully watching this and hoping that my OWN party does their work for them.

When I announced my campaign for president, I knew it would come with slander and attacks. But it has been quite unfortunate that some of those attacks have come from within our own party.

**I am the only candidate who will defeat Hillary Clinton next November, but I cannot do so unless I have your support today. **

[**Would you please consider chipping in $5, $10, $15 or more right now to ensure we meet our November goal?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)
---
| | [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**Emergency November DONATION**
**Donation: Pending** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)
---
| **The time has come for our generation to lead the way toward a New American Century. [Your donation today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)** will send a strong message to the leftist mainstream media that our campaign has the fortitude of thousands in every state and every corner of the United States; and together we are going _**to take our country back. **_

In order to fight back, and ensure victory next fall I need **[your support.
Peter, will you strengthen my campaign by making a much needed donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)**

Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)
---
| Marco Rubio
Republican Candidate for President P.S. Your support today will go a long way for our campaign. Our campaign's Month-End deadline is quickly approaching and I need your help to ensure we finish the month with the strongest numbers possible. [**Please follow this link to make a donation right now to guarantee your name is there!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140856:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45140857:6lCXenLVN:m:1:1349778030:5A1875F15679A092726CD9EE38AE38FA:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Team Katie
subject: Dig deep
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

This is when we dig deep. Reach high. Toughen up. Push through.

Whatever your favorite metaphor is -- use it. Use it now. **We 're just one day out from our big November deadline, and we need your help TODAY to defeat Pat Toomey and send Katie to the U.S. Senate.**

[**Can you send a quick $5 donation to help us reach our goal by this critical deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8526104746551934976/5164242288431333376?refcode=e20151129.2&refcode2=e20151129nd.2&amount=25)

If we can defeat Pat Toomey and take back the Senate for Democrats, we can pass meaningful legislation to expand health care, protect women's reproductive freedoms, grow our economy, raise the minimum wage, expand Medicare, and so much more.

We're in the very last stretch -- the final 34 hours -- before the end-of-month deadline, and there is literally no time to lose.

[**Make a donation now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8526104746551934976/5164242288431333376?refcode=e20151129.2&refcode2=e20151129nd.2&amount=25)

**We 've got one day to go and 460 more donors to bring in to ensure we don't fall short.**

So close. But we can do it.

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8526104746551934976/5164242288431333376?refcode=e20151129.2&refcode2=e20151129nd.2&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/8526104746551934976/5092184694393405440).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: President George H.W. Bush
subject: Why am I a proud father?
body:
Friend -

It's been a long road so far, and as you may have heard Jeb say on the trail, I've caught myself throwing my shoes at the nonsense on TV a couple times this year.

That's why I'm reaching out. Jeb needs your help.

**Midnight tomorrow marks the end of another month, and the most important fundraising deadline yet for Jeb.**

[**So I 'm asking, will you contribute $50 right now? Will you help us reach our goal of $200,000? Will you help us win?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dchkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbhgchd_ufpnnmcy.html)

You know I'm a proud father, but I'm reaching out from more than just pride: I know Jeb can fix Washington because he's already done it in Florida.

**[Friend , I'm asking one last time before this month is over, contribute $100, $50, $15 or whatever you can afford right now, before the midnight deadline.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dcpkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbhgchs_ufpnnmcy.html)**

One last note, Friend. As I'm writing, Barbara, or as we call her, "The Enforcer," is sitting next to me writing an email of her own for those that don't step up. From the looks of it, you don't want to get that follow up email.

So, please chip in today: [**Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wgdqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhvfgvj_ufpnnmcy.html)

All the best,

George H.W. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jrnhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpjsvts_ufpnnmcy.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5980&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Team Murphy
subject: It's make or break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

You probably know by now that Florida's Senate race is a **toss up**. Anyone could take it at this point.

But you should also know that Florida's fate won't be the only one hanging in the balance next November -- **the fates of the Senate and the middle class also depend on this race.**

If Patrick wins, Democrats can regain majority control and devote the Senate's efforts to raising the minimum wage, protecting Americans' access to affordable health care, and expanding programs like Social Security and Medicare.

Like we said though, this race is still a toss up -- unless you take action now.

[**We 're counting on you to help Patrick pull ahead. We only have 24 hours to go before our end-of-the-month deadline. If you donate $3 or $5 right now, we'll be on pace to reach our goal of $50,000.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c4/738133e4/3bd83b71/7f83479e/1255477166/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151129?refcode=pme151129_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Patrick is going to need support from folks like you if he's going to bring the Senate home for Democrats.

Remember, Patrick won't just be battling an opponent. He'll be taking on the Koch brothers, their millions -- and as _Politico_ just revealed -- a Koch-funded intelligence team, complete with an ex-CIA analyst, dedicated to spying on Democratic-aligned organizations.

[**The attacks on Patrick have already begun. If we 're going to stop the Kochs and take the Senate we need to reach $50,000 in 24 hours. Chip in what you can to help us get there.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c4/738133e4/3bd83b71/7f83479e/1255477166/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151129?refcode=pme151129_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c4/738133e4/3bd83b71/7f83479f/1255477166/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c4/738133e4/3bd83b71/7f834798/1255477166/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21c4/738133e4/3bd83b71/7f834799/1255477166/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Chris Christie
subject: Did you see the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
I know I've said it before, but the support we feel in the town hall meetings around New Hampshire is real and continuing to build. This morning, I woke up and saw just how strong this campaign is on the front page of the New Hampshire Union Leader. I'm honored to have their support and confidence.

We can feel the momentum but we need your support. **[Chip in $5, $25, $75 today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45141374:JHQR0nLND:m:1:1516426255:3798199AFD75FA477F8A980DFEA93852:r)** , and let's prove the Union Leader and New Hampshire are right - I'm the only person to take on Hillary Clinton next fall.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45141374:JHQR0nLND:m:1:1516426255:3798199AFD75FA477F8A980DFEA93852:r)

Thanks,
Chris
****

****
****
****

| |
---|---|---

If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQxMTE5NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgyODgzMDE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Josh Handelman
subject: First thing tomorrow morning
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

First thing tomorrow morning, I'm going to give Katie an update on our fundraising numbers for this month. **Here 's a look at the most recent information I have on file for this email address:**

| Email Address: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Donated to support Katie?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7460545831683227648/6822129901257097216?refcode=e20151129.3&refcode2=e20151129nd.3&amount=10) [_**NOT YET**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7460545831683227648/6822129901257097216?refcode=e20151129.3&refcode2=e20151129nd.3&amount=10)
**Suggested contribution:[$5 today >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7460545831683227648/6822129901257097216?refcode=e20151129.3&refcode2=e20151129nd.3&amount=10)**
---

[**RIGHT NOW: Make your first contribution to Katie 's campaign and help us reach our goal of 5,000 founding donors. We're still 225 donors away from our goal -- and we can't afford to fall short.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7460545831683227648/6822129901257097216?refcode=e20151129.3&refcode2=e20151129nd.3&amount=10)

I've been running the numbers since late last night, and unless we double down and pick up the pace right now, we run the risk of falling short of our November goal. **This is all hands on deck, and Katie 's counting on you to chip in right now:**

[**Make an urgent donation to Katie today and make sure we turn Pennsylvania back to Blue.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7460545831683227648/6822129901257097216?refcode=e20151129.3&refcode2=e20151129nd.3&amount=10)

All the pundits agree: This race is going to be razor-thin. **Early donations like yours will make all the difference. Katie is counting on your help today.**

Thanks for chipping in,

Josh Handelman
Finance Director
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7460545831683227648/6822129901257097216?refcode=e20151129.3&refcode2=e20151129nd.3&amount=10)
---

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: the next battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| friend,

As this Thanksgiving weekend draws to a close, I am girding myself for the next big fight ahead. It's hard to believe that despite all the big challenges we face at home and abroad, the attention of the Congress will be focused on another battle over keeping our government open.

I will be hard at work in the coming days trying to prevent another government shutdown on December 11. Republicans are threatening once again to reject a spending bill if it contains anything they don't like, from access to women's health care or environmental regulations -- even threatening to use the unspeakable violence in Syria as an excuse.

That's why I need your help. We want to deliver a powerful message to Republicans about the kind of leadership this country badly needs.

**[Monday is the first deadline since a new statewide poll showed us leading by double digits. Please help us show the strength of our people-powered movement and carry our momentum forward.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c5c/70cdc2ba/47bff317/39676f1/3707865508/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhnov-15-eom?refcode=em11292015&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Monday+is+the+first+deadline+since+a+new&utm_campaign=em11292015&source=em11292015")**

Keeping our government working and our nation moving forward is no easy task when you're dealing with the Tea Party. But I will keep working every day to get things done to advance our priorities and progressive agenda in the U.S. Senate.

**[Please help us get there by making a contribution right now. We need to raise $10,000 more in the next two days to reach our November goal.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c5c/70cdc2ba/47bff317/396768e/3707865508/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhnov-15-eom?refcode=em11292015&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+help+us+get+there+by+making+a+con&utm_campaign=em11292015&source=em11292015")**

I am reminded every day how fortunate I am to have the support of so many people from across our great state that care deeply about the issues facing our country.

With your support, our momentum continues.

Many thanks,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c5c/70cdc2ba/47bff317/396768f/3707865508/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em11292015&source=em11292015") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
